publications.title: Artificial intelligence and data

publications.title: The AI Omnibus: what it means for AI strategies
publications.summary: Deloitte UK analyses which EU AI Act simplifications are settled or still in play under the Digital Omnibus and what they mean for AI strategy.

publications.title: The UK’s framework for AI regulation
publications.summary: Deloitte UK summarises the UK pro-innovation AI regulatory framework, including safety, transparency, fairness, accountability and redress principles.
